zh.lifeSummary: 當William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby於1276年出生在英國越可爾曼諾時，他的父親William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby35歲，母親Alice Ledet28歲。他和Lucia de Thwenge至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1327年2月27日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可比享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby于1276年出生在英国越可爾曼諾时，他的父亲William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby35岁，母亲Alice Ledet28岁。他和Lucia de Thwenge至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1327年2月27日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可比享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby was born in 1276, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, his father, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, was 35 and his mother, Alice Ledet, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lucia de Thwenge. He died on 27 February 1327, in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby est né en 1276, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Ledet, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lucia de Thwenge. Il est décédé le 27 février 1327, à Corby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby 1276 in Manor, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby 35 und seine Mutter Alice Ledet 28. Er hatte mit Lucia de Thwenge mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1327 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby è nato il nel 1276 nel Manor, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Ledet, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lucia de Thwenge. Morì il 27 febbraio 1327, nel Corby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corbyが1276年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corbyは35歳，母Alice Ledetは28歳であった。彼はLucia de Thwengeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1327年2月27日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルビーで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby(이)가 1276년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ledet(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Lucia de Thwenge(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 2월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 코르비에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby nasceu em 1276, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ledet, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lucia de Thwenge. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1327, em Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby родился в 1276 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ledet, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lucia de Thwenge. Он умер 27 февраля 1327 г. в местности корби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby nació en 1276, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Ledet, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lucia de Thwenge. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1327, en Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
